title: dalbergia delphinensis
intro: Dalbergia delphinensis, also known as the Black Acacia or Black Ebony, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits associated with Dalbergia delphinensis include reducing fever, treating wounds, and managing diabetes, as well as providing protection against certain infections. Herbal preparations of Dalbergia delphinensis are typically made by boiling the bark or roots in water, and are used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
